pageContext.name: Severus Snape
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios present the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 line - Severus Snape! Based on the likeness of the Alan Rickman from Harry Potter, this polystone Severus Snape statue is a hand-painted and limited edition Harry Potter collectible.   Harry Potter fans, don't miss your chance to add this Severus Snape figure to your Harry Potter collection!
